episodes.title: UPDATE | Expanse: The Nannup Four - Hope on the horizon
episodes.description: Host of season 6, Expanse: The Nannup Four, Dominique Bayens has been following the developments of the case of four people who disappeared from the isolated town of Nannup. Learn more about your ad choices. Visit megaphone.fm/adchoices

episodes.title: Behind the scenes | S6 host Dominique Bayens in conversation
episodes.description: What goes into making a season of Expanse? What considerations are made when telling the stories of people's lives? Host of Expanse: The Nannup Four, Dominique Bayens, sits down with fellow podcast host Phil Vine to take you behind the curtain.

episodes.title: BONUS | Inside the Nannup Four police investigation
episodes.description: It has been months in the making, but police are opening up the files on the missing Nannup Four for Expanse host Dominique Bayens, and there's news on another search.

episodes.title: BONUS | Who was Tony Popic?
episodes.description: Since the podcast started rolling out, a lot of people have got in touch with information. Two people have been able to shed light on some previously unknown parts of the story.

episodes.title: 06 Expanse: The Nannup Four | Northcliffe
episodes.description:
A family friend and former policeman continues to search for answers for Jim and Cath McDougall decades after the Nannup four vanished. The family and friends of Chantelle McDougall try to find their own answers, as one last glimmer of hope emerges.

This is the final episode of a bizarre Australian disappearance: What happened to cult leader Gary Felton, Antonio Popic, Chantelle & Leela McDougall?

episodes.title: 05 Expanse: The Nannup Four | Simon says
episodes.description: Jim and Cath McDougall are left reeling as the true depth of Simon Kadwill’s deception is revealed. Dominique tracks down people from his past, and hears from someone who has never spoken before who provides a startling insight into how Simon might have ended up on the path he did. episodes.title: 04 Expanse: The Nannup Four | A question of belief
episodes.description:
Subscribe: https://ab.co/3yqPOZ5   Read more here:

The story of Chantelle McDougall and her 5 year old daughter Leela vanished from Nannup, Western Australia in 2007, while entwined in the “Truth Fellowship” cult continues in episode four of this vodcast series. 

Tony Popic is talking about an end of days, Simon is seeing spirits and Chantelle is forced into a difficult decision as increasingly troubling hints something's not right come to light. Then, Chantelle’s parents Jim and Cath McDougall receive a phone call that precipitates a chain of events that will change everything. 

Who are the missing people who disappeared into this cult?
The baffling mystery of a cult Nannup family of four who disappeared in 2007. 
Four people who were part of an online doomsday cult disappeared from a small Australian town.

episodes.title: 03 Expanse: The Nannup Four | Down the rabbit hole
episodes.description:
When three adults and a child disappear without a trace from the isolated bush community of Nannup in 2007, it sparks disturbing theories about what might have happened. What was going on in the little blue house, and could understanding that hold the key to the disappearance?

Host Dominique Bayens starts unpicking the rumours of cults, hidden identities and bizarre behaviour.

Dominique travels across the country to meet the two people who might be able to help her understand how Chantelle came to be living a reclusive life in a hidden corner of Western Australia, alongside a self-styled spiritual guru 18 years her senior eventually leading to her disappearance.

episodes.description: When four people disappeared from a blue farmhouse on the outskirts of the Western Australian town of Nannup in 2007, they left behind the scatterings of a life, a note pinned to their door and a question: was the disappearance a choice... or murder?
